---
title: "Teaching"
---

## Penn State University

### Course title

Course description and semester information.

## University of California, Los Angeles

### ECON 105: Statistics for Economists

Instructor, Fall 2025

- [Syllabus](files/econ105_syllabus_fall2025_updated.pdf)
- [Teaching evaluations](files/econ105_syllabus_fall2025_updated.pdf)

### Additional teaching experience

Add courses, teaching-assistant positions, workshops, or student evaluations here.
